title: Inner & Hollow Earth
summary: The inhabited interior of the planet and its councils, described across the archive.
markdown:
**Inner Earth** — and the **Hollow Earth** — appear in the archive as an inhabited realm within
the planet, complete with its own peoples and councils. In the August 10, 2020 session a
questioner raises the "Hollow Earth, where there is a sun in the center," and in the February
2024 material Unimetrix 1 references "the Andromeda Council and the Inner Earth Councils."

This realm connects directly to [Agartha](/lore/agartha/), the subterranean civilization the
archive names, and to its wider vision of hidden geographies — worlds above in the stars and
worlds below the surface, both part of the larger reality Unimetrix 1 describes.

Inner Earth extends the archive's central claim into the planet itself: that the visible world
is only a portion of what is real, and that councils and civilizations exist in places ordinary
perception never reaches.
